character.name: EmpireSwordsman
character.prompt:
Fire Emblem GBA style chibi enemy swordsman duelist, western fantasy,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions, total body height equals 3 head heights stacked, body proportionally sized to support the large head NOT undersized, total figure looks balanced like a Fire Emblem GBA chibi sprite,
short body, small hands and feet,
generic imperial duelist swordmaster in european medieval setting,
plain forgettable enemy mook face, weary tired expression, small narrow eyes, NOT a hero face, NOT large bright sparkling eyes, dull faded gaze of a low-ranking soldier,
lean man in his late 20s with sharp jaw and a thin diagonal scar across left cheek partially visible,
dark teal green tabard over dark steel breastplate and chainmail sleeves, brass trim accents,
classic western soldier swordmaster style,
short cropped dark brown hair swept back,
one-handed steel longsword held in right hand pointed down at side in a ready guard,
empty left hand at side,
brown leather belt with brass buckle, leather bracers on both forearms,
no helmet, no shield, no cape, no kettle hat,
clean pixel art, vibrant colors, sharp silhouette
